title: Sutando config
description: Contract for sutando.config.json and sutando.config.local.json. The loader (src/sutando_config.{py,ts}) deep-merges the two and expands ${REPO_DIR} in every string value before validating against this schema. Keys whose name starts with `_` are stripped before validation (comment convention used in the .example file).

workspace.description: Workspace location config. Resolution order: $SUTANDO_WORKSPACE env (legacy escape hatch, warn) > sutando.config.local.json > sutando.config.json > baked-in default ${REPO_DIR}/workspace.

path.description: Absolute or ${REPO_DIR}-relative path to the workspace directory. The loader expands ${REPO_DIR} to the directory containing this file (== git toplevel for a sane checkout).

claude_sutando_config_dir.description: Where the Sutando-scoped Claude Code config lives — set via the `claude-sutando` shell function as CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR. Constrained to a workspace sub-folder so the M2 vault sync engine can include it via a single workspace-relative glob; if the path escapes the workspace, sync coherence breaks.

subdir.description: Sub-folder of <workspace> for CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR. MUST be a relative sub-path of the workspace — absolute paths (leading `/`) and `..` parent-directory escapes are rejected. The loader additionally asserts the resolved final path stays under workspace (defense in depth).

vault.description: Vault (durable knowledge sync) config. Off by default; opt-in by setting enabled=true in sutando.config.local.json plus a remote_url. The sync engine (M2) reads sync.include + sync.exclude to decide what flows to the remote.

enabled.description: Master switch for vault sync. When false, no remote pushes regardless of other vault settings.

remote_url.description: URL of the remote git repo that holds the synced workspace subset. Empty string means unconfigured.

sync.description: What to sync. Include is an allowlist of paths relative to the workspace root; exclude carves out machine-local noise from within included paths. Arrays REPLACE on merge (not unioned) — overriding in .local.json wipes the defaults for that array.

include.description: Workspace-relative paths to sync. Trailing slash convention indicates a directory.

exclude.description: Workspace-relative paths to skip during sync. Glob patterns supported (e.g. '*.heartbeat').

interval_seconds.description: Seconds between sync runs when sync is enabled. Minimum 60 to avoid hammering the remote.
